podcasts.title: All-In Podcast
podcasts.description: Industry veterans break down the biggest stories in technology, economics, and politics.
podcasts.searchText: All-In Podcast Chamath Jason Sacks Friedberg technology economics politics venture capital
podcasts.notes:
Best for understanding how four very different operators argue with each other in real time. I listen for the disagreement, not the conclusions.

The macro/policy episodes age unevenly. Company breakdowns and founder interviews hold up much better.
takeaways: Watch how each host frames the same story differently — that's the actual product.
Skip the cold-open banter; signal density picks up around the 10-minute mark.
Treat predictions as positioning, not forecasts.

episodes.title: All-In Summit founder interviews
episodes.note: Live interviews are tighter than the regular weekly episodes.
